mapper.select: SELECT industry_name, COUNT(*) as workplace_count, SUM(member_count) as total_members, AVG(member_count) as avg_members_per_workplace, MAX(member_count) as max_members, COUNT(DISTINCT sido_code) as region_count FROM datacollection_national_pension WHERE workplace_status_code = '1' AND industry_name IS NOT NULL AND industry_name != 'BIZ_NO미존재사업장' AND industry_name != '해당없음' AND member_count >= #{minMemberCount} GROUP BY industry_name HAVING SUM(member_count) >= #{minMemberCount} ORDER BY total_members DESC, workplace_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT industry_name, industry_code, COUNT(*) as workplace_count, SUM(member_count) as total_members, AVG(member_count) as avg_members, MIN(member_count) as min_members, MAX(member_count) as max_members, STDDEV(member_count) as stddev_members FROM datacollection_national_pension WHERE workplace_status_code = '1' AND industry_name IS NOT NULL AND industry_name != 'BIZ_NO미존재사업장' AND industry_name != '해당없음' GROUP BY industry_name, industry_code ORDER BY total_members DESC

SELECT DISTINCT industry_name FROM datacollection_national_pension WHERE workplace_status_code = '1' AND industry_name IS NOT NULL AND industry_name != 'BIZ_NO미존재사업장' AND industry_name != '해당없음' AND member_count >= #{minMemberCount} ORDER BY industry_name LIMIT #{batchSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT industry_name) FROM datacollection_national_pension WHERE workplace_status_code = '1' AND industry_name IS NOT NULL AND industry_name != 'BIZ_NO미존재사업장' AND industry_name != '해당없음' AND member_count >= #{minMemberCount}

SELECT industry_name, COUNT(*) as active_workplaces, SUM(member_count) as total_active_members, AVG(monthly_notice_amount) as avg_notice_amount, COUNT(DISTINCT SUBSTRING(address_road FROM '^[^ ]+')) as region_diversity FROM datacollection_national_pension WHERE workplace_status_code = '1' AND industry_name IS NOT NULL AND industry_name != 'BIZ_NO미존재사업장' AND industry_name != '해당없음' GROUP BY industry_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10 -- 최소 10개 사업장 ORDER BY total_active_members DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT workplace_name, business_registration_number, member_count, monthly_notice_amount, address_road, sido_code, sigungu_code, application_date FROM datacollection_national_pension WHERE workplace_status_code = '1' AND industry_name = #{industryName} AND member_count > 0 ORDER BY member_count DESC, monthly_notice_amount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT industry_code, industry_name, COUNT(*) as usage_count, SUM(member_count) as total_members_in_code FROM datacollection_national_pension WHERE workplace_status_code = '1' AND industry_name IS NOT NULL AND industry_code IS NOT NULL AND industry_name != 'BIZ_NO미존재사업장' AND industry_name != '해당없음' GROUP BY industry_code, industry_name ORDER BY industry_code, total_members_in_code DESC

SELECT industry_name, industry_code, COUNT(*) as workplace_frequency, SUM(member_count) as total_members, AVG(member_count) as avg_members_per_workplace, MAX(member_count) as max_workplace_size, COUNT(DISTINCT sido_code) as geographic_spread, -- 키워드 추출용 추가 정보 STRING_AGG(DISTINCT SUBSTRING(address_road FROM '^[^ ]+'), ',') as representative_regions, AVG(monthly_notice_amount) as avg_monthly_amount, -- 업종 특성 분석용 CASE WHEN industry_name LIKE '%제조%' OR industry_name LIKE '%생산%' THEN '제조업' WHEN industry_name LIKE '%소프트웨어%' OR industry_name LIKE '%전자%' OR industry_name LIKE '%컴퓨터%' OR industry_name LIKE '%정보%' THEN 'IT' WHEN industry_name LIKE '%건설%' OR industry_name LIKE '%공사%' OR industry_name LIKE '%시공%' THEN '건설' WHEN industry_name LIKE '%도매%' OR industry_name LIKE '%소매%' OR industry_name LIKE '%판매%' THEN '유통' WHEN industry_name LIKE '%서비스%' OR industry_name LIKE '%지원%' OR industry_name LIKE '%상담%' THEN '서비스업' WHEN industry_name LIKE '%의료%' OR industry_name LIKE '%병원%' OR industry_name LIKE '%약%' THEN '의료' WHEN industry_name LIKE '%금융%' OR industry_name LIKE '%보험%' OR industry_name LIKE '%투자%' THEN '금융' WHEN industry_name LIKE '%운송%' OR industry_name LIKE '%물류%' OR industry_name LIKE '%배송%' THEN '운송' WHEN industry_name LIKE '%교육%' OR industry_name LIKE '%학원%' OR industry_name LIKE '%연구%' THEN '교육' ELSE '기타' END as inferred_category, -- 데이터 품질 지표 COUNT(*) * SUM(member_count) as relevance_score FROM datacollection_national_pension WHERE workplace_status_code = '1' AND industry_name IS NOT NULL AND industry_name != 'BIZ_NO미존재사업장' AND industry_name != '해당없음' AND member_count >= #{minMemberCount} AND industry_name != '' AND LENGTH(industry_name) >= 3 -- 최소 3글자 업종명 GROUP BY industry_name, industry_code HAVING SUM(member_count) >= #{minMemberCount} * 2 -- 충분한 데이터 AND COUNT(*) >= 3 -- 최소 3개 사업장 ORDER BY relevance_score DESC, total_members DESC LIMIT #{limit}
